steps.title: Translate the English into an inequality
steps.content:
The phrase describes $x$ as being at most some value.

That value is 17 less than 5 times $y$, which is $5y - 17$.

Therefore:
$$x \leq 5y - 17$$

steps.title: Substitute y = 3 and solve for the greatest x
steps.content:
Substitute $y = 3$:
$$x \leq 5(3) - 17$$
$$x \leq 15 - 17$$
$$x \leq -2$$
The greatest possible value of $x$ is $-2$.
